creator: okazaki@be.to
text:
This is a port fix for devel/omniORB.

	Summary of changes are...
	  * respect CC, CXX, CFLAGS, CXXFLAGS.
	  * turn on USE_NEWGCC.
	  * don't use mkdirhier (to avoid implicit BUILD_DEPENDS on XFree86)
	  * define ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=i386.
	  * tweak do-install rules.
	  * revise some patch for the socklen_t issue.
	  * fit library file names in the ELF world
            to enable making package on -STABLE and -CURRENT.

	Added files:
	   patches/patch-ad patch-ae patch-af patch-ag patch-ah patch-ai
	Removed files:
	   NONE

Fix: Please apply this patch, thanks.
